text: If a notice of reexamination was issued pursuant to Section 21061, the record of arrest for the traffic violation, or any notice to appear issued under this article, or both, shall include a notation indicating that the notice of reexamination was issued to the arrested person and the driver’s license record maintained by the department shall contain a record of the notice of reexamination. markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 2. Procedure on Arrests [40300 - 40618]
#### Article 1. Arrests [40300 - 40313]
##### § 40313

If a notice of reexamination was issued pursuant to Section 21061, the record of arrest for the traffic violation, or any notice to appear issued under this article, or both, shall include a notation indicating that the notice of reexamination was issued to the arrested person and the driver’s license record maintained by the department shall contain a record of the notice of reexamination. The record of the notice of reexamination shall be considered confidential by the department pursuant to Section 1808.5.

*(Added by Stats. 1986, Ch. 304, Sec. 5. Operative July 1, 1987, by Sec. 6 of Ch. 304.)*

The record of the notice of reexamination shall be considered confidential by the department pursuant to Section 1808.5.
